checks.stdout_tail:
Usage: cli.py post-closure-observability-harvest [OPTIONS]                     
                                                                                
 Emit bounded post-closure observability receipts without reopening the closed  
 queue.                                                                         
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *  --radius              -r      INTEGER RANGE [x>=1]  Bounded number of     │
│                                                        observation receipts  │
│                                                        to emit.              │
│                                                        [required]            │
│    --source-closure-re…          TEXT                  Accepted closure      │
│                                                        review receipt id.    │
│                                                        [default: 52d0ea8d]   │
│    --label                       TEXT                  Optional run label.   │
│    --help                                              Show this message and │
│                                                        exit.                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
